message:
feat: wire provider_options through all adapters (thinking, reasoning_effort)

Pass provider_options.anthropic.thinking and .betas to Anthropic API,
provider_options.gemini.thinkingConfig to Gemini API, and
reasoning_effort to OpenAI Responses API. Anthropic thinking
automatically suppresses temperature (API requirement).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
